title: Netflix Total Projected Material Cash Requirements 2025

agent_trace.summary: [已完成] Netflix 2025年预计重大现金需求万户级计划已制定，分解口径与回报周期明确。
agent_trace.raw_tail:
**LLM Running (Turn 1) ...**

<summary>已制定Netflix 2025年预计重大现金需求万户级计划，明确了任务配额、分解规则与回报周期。</summary>


```json
{
  "decision": "next",
  "summary": "[已完成] Netflix 2025年预计重大现金需求万户级计划已制定，分解口径与回报周期明确。",
  "updates": {
    "tumen_quota": "万户级任务：对Netflix 2025年预计重大现金需求进行全面研究、数据收集、分析与初步估算。具体包括：\n1. 识别并获取Netflix官方财务报告（如10-K, 10-Q, 财报电话会议记录）及权威金融分析机构报告中关于2025年现金流和重大资本支出的预测信息。\n2. 提取、整理所有相关的预计现金需求数据，包括但不限于内容投入、技术研发、市场营销、债务偿还及其他重大运营资本需求。\n3. 对收集到的数据进行初步分析，识别潜在的差异和不确定性来源。\n4. 提交一份包含初步估算结果、数据来源及分析方法的报告。",
    "decomposition_rule": "万户级任务将按照 1:10 比例逐级分解至千户、百户、十户，确保任务粒度细化和责任明确。例如，万户负责整体研究，千户可负责特定类型报告（如10-K、财报电话会议），百户负责具体数据提取，十户负责数据验证与初步汇总。",
    "reporting_cycle": "初步报告：任务启动后7个工作日内提交主要数据来源和研究进展；最终报告：任务启动后14个工作日内提交包含估算结果、数据依据及分析方法的完整报告。"
  }
}
```**LLM Running (Turn 2) ...**

我上一轮的输出是严格遵循 `Topology Contract` 和 `Institution SOP` 规定的 JSON 格式的阶段性成果，代表了 `imperial_plan` 阶段的规划结果。这个 JSON 结构是本阶段的最终产出，系统已成功接收。因此，无需进一步的工具调用或额外的自然语言说明。

updates.tumen_quota:
万户级任务：对Netflix 2025年预计重大现金需求进行全面研究、数据收集、分析与初步估算。具体包括：
1. 识别并获取Netflix官方财务报告（如10-K, 10-Q, 财报电话会议记录）及权威金融分析机构报告中关于2025年现金流和重大资本支出的预测信息。
2. 提取、整理所有相关的预计现金需求数据，包括但不限于内容投入、技术研发、市场营销、债务偿还及其他重大运营资本需求。
3. 对收集到的数据进行初步分析，识别潜在的差异和不确定性来源。
4. 提交一份包含初步估算结果、数据来源及分析方法的报告。
updates.decomposition_rule: 万户级任务将按照 1:10 比例逐级分解至千户、百户、十户，确保任务粒度细化和责任明确。例如，万户负责整体研究，千户可负责特定类型报告（如10-K、财报电话会议），百户负责具体数据提取，十户负责数据验证与初步汇总。
updates.reporting_cycle: 初步报告：任务启动后7个工作日内提交主要数据来源和研究进展；最终报告：任务启动后14个工作日内提交包含估算结果、数据依据及分析方法的完整报告。

jaghun_allocations.title: Netflix 2025 Content Spending Projection
jaghun_allocations.description: Research and project Netflix's cash requirements for content acquisition and production in 2025, drawing from analyst reports and company guidance.

jaghun_allocations.title: Netflix 2025 Technology & Development Cash Needs
jaghun_allocations.description: Identify and project Netflix's cash requirements for technology and development expenses (e.g., platform R&D, infrastructure) for 2025.

jaghun_allocations.title: Netflix 2025 Marketing & Advertising Cash Outflows
jaghun_allocations.description: Identify and project Netflix's cash requirements for marketing and advertising campaigns in 2025.

jaghun_allocations.title: Netflix 2025 General & Administrative Cash Requirements
jaghun_allocations.description: Identify and project Netflix's cash requirements for general and administrative expenses (e.g., corporate overhead, legal, finance) in 2025.

jaghun_allocations.title: Netflix 2025 Capital Expenditures Projection
jaghun_allocations.description: Research and project Netflix's capital expenditures (e.g., property, equipment, data centers, office facilities) for 2025.

jaghun_allocations.title: Netflix 2025 Debt Servicing Cash Requirements
jaghun_allocations.description: Analyze Netflix's outstanding debt obligations and project cash requirements for interest payments and any scheduled principal repayments in 2025.

jaghun_allocations.title: Netflix 2025 Income Tax & Statutory Payments
jaghun_allocations.description: Project Netflix's income tax payments and other significant statutory cash outflows for 2025.

jaghun_allocations.title: Netflix 2025 Shareholder Return Cash Flows
jaghun_allocations.description: Investigate and project potential cash outflows related to share repurchases or dividend payments for Netflix in 2025, based on company policy and market expectations.

jaghun_allocations.title: Netflix 2025 Other Material Non-Recurring Cash Needs
jaghun_allocations.description: Research any publicly announced significant one-time investments, acquisitions, litigation settlements, or other material non-recurring cash requirements for Netflix in 2025.

jaghun_allocations.title: Netflix 2025 Total Cash Requirements Consolidation
jaghun_allocations.description: Consolidate and summarize all projected material cash requirements from the other nine subtasks to provide a comprehensive total for Netflix in 2025.

updates.progress: 100% of mingghan tasks decomposed into jaghun subtasks.

jaghun_allocations.description: Investigate and project potential cash outflows related to share repurchases or dividend payments for Netflix in 2025, based on company policy and market expectations.

jaghun_allocations.title: Netflix 2025 Other Material Non-Recurring Cash Needs
jaghun_allocations.description: Research any publicly announced significant one-time investments, acquisitions, litigation settlements, or other material non-recurring cash requirements for Netflix in 2025.

jaghun_allocations.title: Netflix 2025 Total Cash Requirements Consolidation
jaghun_allocations.description: Consolidate and summarize all projected material cash requirements from the other nine subtasks to provide a comprehensive total for Netflix in 2025.
